title: Privacy Policy
content:
Privacy Policy

True Homecare Ltd is independently owned and operated. True Homecare is a data controller for the personal information it collects and processes. For contact details of those responsible for data protection compliance within True Homecare, please contact the business directly. For data protection queries for True Homecare Ltd, please contact the Director, True Homecare Ltd, 1st Floor, 3A Wilmslow Road Cheadle Stockport SK8 1DW.

Your Rights

Because the data we hold about you is your data, you have the following rights in respect of the personal data we hold about you:
    1. Right to Access – this means you can ask us for a copy of all the personal data we hold about you.
    2. Correction Right – if you believe any of the information we hold about you is incorrect or out of date, you have the right to correct such information by providing us with the correct up to date information. In addition, you can ask us to delete the incorrect or out of date information and we will be happy to do so unless we are prevented from doing so by law or regulation.
    3. Right to Erasure – you have the right to ask us to delete the personal data we hold about you where such data is used for direct marketing purposes or is processed as a result of you consenting to such processing. Please note that where we are obliged to keep your personal data because of a regulatory or legal requirement, we will not be able to delete that data and must continue to retain it.
    4. Right to Restrict Processing – in some limited circumstances you have the right to restrict the processing of your data. See examples below:
      • if you want us to establish the data’s accuracy;
      • where our use of the data is unlawful but you do not want us to erase it;
      • where you need us to hold the data even if we no longer require it as you need it to establish, exercise or defend legal claims; or
      • you have objected to our use of your data, but we need to verify whether we have overriding legitimate grounds to use it.
    5. Right of Objection to Processing - you have the right to object to us using your data for direct marketing purposes and to profiling. For example, if there is something about your situation which makes you want to object to processing as you feel it impacts on your fundamental rights and freedoms. In some cases, we may demonstrate that we have compelling legitimate grounds to process your information which override your rights and freedoms.
    6. Right of Data Portability – you have the right to request a copy of the personal data we hold about you in a commonly used and machine-readable format. We can provide your data either to you or to such other third party as you specify in your request.
If you would like to exercise any of the above rights, please contact us in writing on saima.zafar@truehomecare.co.uk or True Homecare, 1st Floor, 3A Wilmslow Road Cheadle Stockport SK8 1DW.

Right to Complain

If you have any concerns about our handling of your personal data, you have the right to lodge a complaint with the Information Commissioner’s Office (“ICO”) by visiting https://ico.org.uk/concerns/ or by telephoning the ICO helpline on 0303 123 1113. ","_wysiwyg":"field_650ae5a9da413"},"mode":"edit"} /-->

","_description_left":"field_64b66f5732ece-trf","cta_left":{"title":"Explore","url":"https://truehomecare.co.uk/financing/","target":"_blank"},"_cta_left":"field_64b6717f6fbd4-trf"},"mode":"edit"} /-->

<!-- wp:acf/accordion-trf {"name":"acf/accordion-trf","data":{"heading":"True Homecare FAQ","_heading":"field_64b67629da6e2-trf","items_0_title":"Is True Homecare Registered with the appropriate professional associations and bodies?","_items_0_title":"field_64b6764eda6e4-trf","items_0_description":"Yes, True Homecare is registered with The Care Quality Commission (CQC). We are proud of being on the Preferred Providers List of the Stockport Council.","_items_0_description":"field_64b6765ada6e5-trf","items_1_title":"How is the level of care to be provided assessed?","_items_1_title":"field_64b6764eda6e4-trf","items_1_description":"Once we’re in contact with a potential client, an initial assessment of all the needs of the client is made, including both medical and non-medical needs. We work with the client and their family to thoroughly understand the level of care needed and expected from our team. After this assessment, our Care Manager will arrange a visit to discuss your needs further and to talk to you about our services and how we can help you.\r\n\r\nAfter conducting a thorough needs assessment, including gathering information from all the people that play a part in our client’s life socially or medically, we select appropriate carers based on the needs of the client. We take pride in offering a completely customised, client-focused service so our clients receive everything they need.","_items_1_description":"field_64b6765ada6e5-trf","items_2_title":"What do you mean by a Customised, tailor-made care plan?","_items_2_title":"field_64b6764eda6e4-trf","items_2_description":"We utilise clearly defined objectives in order to devise a unique, customised care package for each of our clients. We don’t believe in taking a cookie-cutter approach to care. You’re unique and your care should be too. In addition to providing care, we place a lot of emphasis on the safety of each of our clients.\r\nWe work with you to develop a customised care plan that we all agree on. Our Care Plans are not fixed or inflexible, and everything can be adapted. We develop an open care plan that allows our clients to choose what they want to do, when and how they want to do it. We take on the daily responsibilities of providing care and ensuring that our clients remain safe and secure. We enable friends and families to spend quality time together enjoying the activities that they choose while we take care of the necessary daily duties and tasks.","_items_2_description":"field_64b6765ada6e5-trf","items_3_title":"What training do carers receive?","_items_3_title":"field_64b6764eda6e4-trf","items_3_description":"All of our care staff are professionally trained and have extensive backgrounds in providing care. As part of the True Homecare team, our carers receive additional, comprehensive in-house training to ensure that they meet the high standards that we set for all carers. In addition to this, all carers receive ‘on the job’ training to ensure the individual needs of our clients are attended to. Ongoing training and development, regular updates, and careful management by our experienced care manager ensure that we consistently exceed industry standards, including the Skills for Care recommendations.","_items_3_description":"field_64b6765ada6e5-trf","items_4_title":"What quality monitoring/assurance systems are in place?","_items_4_title":"field_64b6764eda6e4-trf","items_4_description":"Our Care Manager has a wealth of experience in monitoring the provision of care, and in ensuring that everything meets True Homecare’s rigorous standards. We make regular telephone contact with our carers, clients, and their representatives. We talk to our clients in confidence to ensure any concerns are raised and addressed. We cultivate a relationship that promotes trust between us and our clients and ensure they feel comfortable complaining if there is an issue. We also have an on-call support line for clients and carers, meaning that help and advice is available whenever it might be needed. We exceed the Care Quality Commission essential standards of quality and safety. We regularly conduct Quality Reviews with the clients to get their feedback and suggestions on the service they are receiving.","_items_4_description":"field_64b6765ada6e5-trf","items_5_title":"What tasks will my care worker carry out?","_items_5_title":"field_64b6764eda6e4-trf","items_5_description":"Once a Care plan is agreed, this becomes the task lists for each day. We are continuously working on improving our service delivery, which means care plans are frequently updated to ensure we are providing the appropriate level of care.","_items_5_description":"field_64b6765ada6e5-trf","items":6,"_items":"field_64b6763eda6e3-trf"},"mode":"edit"} /-->

Our team of experienced and compassionate caregivers is dedicated to ensuring the highest quality of life for our clients, allowing them to maintain their independence in the comfort of their own homes.\r\n\u003cbr\u003e\r\nImagine being surrounded by the comfort of familiar sights and surroundings while you or your loved one receives the support and care you need. Our Team at True Homecare is committed to bringing this joy and comfort into your life through our wide range of in-home personal care services. So, you can maintain your independence, dignity, and quality of life within the coziness of your home.","_description":"field_64c8de09afd20_discover","columns_0_title":"Customer service that’s a perfect fit.","_columns_0_title":"field_64c8dd380c986_discover","columns_0_description":"Your comfort is our priority. Staying socially active is key to staying mentally and emotionally fit, especially for those in need of extra social support. Engaging regularly in social activities creates a sense of belonging and reduces loneliness and stress, thus uplifting your spirits.\r\n\u003cbr\u003e\r\nAt True Homecare, we get this basic human need. Meaningful connections matter a lot. This is why we are committed to bringing joy to those in need of extra social support. Our top-notch home companion care helps make everyday life enjoyable. Whether you want to visit friends, go shopping, watch a movie, visit the hospital, or dive into fun activities, we are here 24 hours to accompany and support you. <!-- wp:acf/accordion-trf {"name":"acf/accordion-trf","data":{"heading":"Personal Care FAQs","_heading":"field_64b67629da6e2-trf","items_0_title":"What are Domiciliary Care Services?","_items_0_title":"field_64b6764eda6e4-trf","items_0_description":"Domiciliary care, often called Dom Care, provides support services like personal care, household chores, and medication management to individuals in their homes. This type of care is necessary for individuals who need help with their daily tasks. Domiciliary home care services ensure your loved ones can complete their tasks independently and continue living in their family surroundings. Domiciliary carer services are designed to provide care where it’s most needed—at home.\r\nThe importance of domiciliary home care cannot be understated. This service ensures your loved ones can stay dignified and independent while receiving the necessary support to manage their daily tasks. Domiciliary care services focus on providing tailored support for each individual’s unique needs.\r\n","_items_0_description":"field_64b6765ada6e5-trf","items_1_title":"Who Needs Domiciliary Care?","_items_1_title":"field_64b6764eda6e4-trf","items_1_description":"Anyone, regardless of age, may require assistance at different stages of life due to their circumstances. The following groups may benefit from domiciliary care services:\r\n\u003cul\u003e\r\n\u003cli\u003eElderly \u0026 seniors who need help with daily tasks and activities.\u003c/li\u003e\r\n\u003cli\u003ePeople recovering from surgery or illness.\u003c/li\u003e\r\n\u003cli\u003eIndividuals with chronic conditions and disabilities.\u003c/li\u003e\r\n\u003cli\u003eThose needing specialized care, such as Dementia \u0026 Alzheimer’s care.\u003c/li\u003e\r\n\u003cli\u003eFamilies requiring respite care for their loved ones.\u003c/li\u003e\r\n\u003cli\u003ePeople who need help with medication management.\u003c/li\u003e\r\n\u003c/ul\u003e","_items_1_description":"field_64b6765ada6e5-trf","items":2,"_items":"field_64b6763eda6e3-trf"},"mode":"edit"} /-->

It’s about providing essential emotional and psychological support to the clients recovering from stroke as well as for the family members who are supporting them. An individual suffering from a stroke undergoes emotional and psychological distress, and our stroke homecare services are designed to address these challenges. This comprehensive approach ensures that your loved ones receive the best care on their recovery journey and the family supporting them also receives good respite care so they can take some time to rest and refresh from a busy, hectic routine.","_items_0_description":"field_64b6765ada6e5-trf","items_1_title":"Are your care plans customizable?","_items_1_title":"field_64b6764eda6e4-trf","items_1_description":"Yes. seo.title: Post-Operative Care at Home - True Homecare
seo.description: True Homecare provides specialized post-operative care at home, offering personalized support to ensure a safe and comfortable recovery after surgery. We provide mobility support, medication management, and more.

title: FAQS
content:
<!-- wp:acf/accordion {"name":"acf/accordion","data":{"heading":"FAQs","_heading":"field_64b67629da6e2","items_0_title":"Is True Homecare Registered with the appropriate professional associations and bodies?","_items_0_title":"field_64b6764eda6e4","items_0_description":"Yes, True Homecare is registered with The Care Quality Commission (CQC). We are proud of being on the Preferred Providers List of the Stockport Council.","_items_0_description":"field_64b6765ada6e5","items_1_title":"How is the level of care to be provided assessed?","_items_1_title":"field_64b6764eda6e4","items_1_description":"Once we’re in contact with a potential client, an initial assessment of all the needs of the client is made, including both medical and non-medical needs. We work with the client and their family to thoroughly understand the level of care needed and expected from our team. After this assessment, our Care Manager will arrange a visit to discuss your needs further and to talk to you about our services and how we can help you.
After conducting a thorough needs assessment, including gathering information from all the people that play a part in our client’s life socially or medically, we select appropriate carers based on the needs of the client. We take pride in offering a completely customised, client-focused service so our clients receive everything they need.","_items_1_description":"field_64b6765ada6e5","items_2_title":"What do you mean by a customized, tailor-made care plan?","_items_2_title":"field_64b6764eda6e4","items_2_description":"We utilise clearly defined objectives in order to devise a unique, customised care package for each of our clients. We don’t believe in taking a cookie-cutter approach to care. You’re unique and your care should be too. In addition to providing care, we place a lot of emphasis on the safety of each of our clients.
We work with you to develop a customised care plan that we all agree on. Our Care Plans are not fixed or inflexible, and everything can be adapted. We develop an open care plan that allows our clients to choose what they want to do, when and how they want to do it. We take on the daily responsibilities of providing care and ensuring that our clients remain safe and secure. We enable friends and families to spend quality time together enjoying the activities that they choose while we take care of the necessary daily duties and tasks.","_items_2_description":"field_64b6765ada6e5","items_3_title":"What training do carers receive?","_items_3_title":"field_64b6764eda6e4","items_3_description":"All of our care staff are professionally trained and have extensive backgrounds in providing care. As part of the True Homecare team, our carers receive additional, comprehensive in-house training to ensure that they meet the high standards that we set for all carers. In addition to this, all carers receive ‘on the job’ training to ensure the individual needs of our clients are attended to. Ongoing training and development, regular updates, and careful management by our experienced care manager ensure that we consistently exceed industry standards, including the Skills for Care recommendations.","_items_3_description":"field_64b6765ada6e5","items_4_title":"What quality monitoring/assurance systems are in place?","_items_4_title":"field_64b6764eda6e4","items_4_description":"Our Care Manager has a wealth of experience in monitoring the provision of care, and in ensuring that everything meets True Homecare’s rigorous standards. We make regular telephone contact with our carers, clients, and their representatives. We talk to our clients in confidence to ensure any concerns are raised and addressed. We cultivate a relationship that promotes trust between us and our clients and ensure they feel comfortable complaining if there is an issue. We also have an on-call support line for clients and carers, meaning that help and advice is available whenever it might be needed. We exceed the Care Quality Commission essential standards of quality and safety. We regularly conduct Quality Reviews with the clients to get their feedback and suggestions on the service they are receiving.","_items_4_description":"field_64b6765ada6e5","items_5_title":"What tasks will my care worker carry out?","_items_5_title":"field_64b6764eda6e4","items_5_description":"Once a Care plan is agreed, this becomes the task lists for each day. We are continuously working on improving our service delivery, which means care plans are frequently updated to ensure we are providing the appropriate level of care.","_items_5_description":"field_64b6765ada6e5","items_6_title":"What if I don’t like my care package or want to make changes?","_items_6_title":"field_64b6764eda6e4","items_6_description":"Then you can make changes! Our experience has taught us that the needs of a client can change relatively frequently. This is why we review our care plans on a regular basis. We welcome any kind of feedback from the client or their family and are happy to incorporate it in the care plan.","_items_6_description":"field_64b6765ada6e5","items_7_title":"What happens if my needs change?","_items_7_title":"field_64b6764eda6e4","items_7_description":"We continuously reassess the care provided to ensure any change in level of care provided is accounted for and implemented as soon as possible.","_items_7_description":"field_64b6765ada6e5","items_8_title":"What do I do if I need to change my call?","_items_8_title":"field_64b6764eda6e4","items_8_description":"Absolutely no problem! Just call the office, ideally 24 hours in advance, or by midday on Friday for weekend calls and we shall do our best to meet your requirements. We endeavour to accommodate the individual needs of all our clients, and we appreciate that medical appointments and family visits require care calls to be rescheduled.","_items_8_description":"field_64b6765ada6e5","items_9_title":"Is there anything that my care worker is not able to do?","_items_9_title":"field_64b6764eda6e4","items_9_description":"Once we have established exactly what you want on each visit, we work to that list. We’ll write out a detailed care plan that will be maintained in your home file. The care plan will be tailored to your requirements, and it will be followed by the carers. We are not able to give injections or change sterile dressings. Also, we cannot carry out tasks which are likely to cause risk to either the client or to the carer. Tasks will be agreed with you in advance. Any changes to the care plan can be discussed with the Care Manager and added in as requested.","_items_9_description":"field_64b6765ada6e5","items_10_title":"Are the carers trained to prepare meals?","_items_10_title":"field_64b6764eda6e4","items_10_description":"Yes, our carers are able to prepare meals. From basic microwaved food to three-course gourmet cuisines.
","_items_10_description":"field_64b6765ada6e5","items_11_title":"Will I be dealing with the same carer each day?","_items_11_title":"field_64b6764eda6e4","items_11_description":"Primarily yes, our clients are assigned a main carer. However, all our carers work in small teams and most work set evenings and every other weekend, so you will get to know the carers in that team. If you have only one call a week you will receive the same carer. In the event of your regular carer’s absence, you will always have a carer you have met before. All our carers are introduced to you by the care manager, care coordinator, or your regular carer, so you will always have a familiar face at your door.
We very rarely have just one care worker assigned to a particular client. This allows for periods of time where your care worker may be away on holiday. However, we do try to keep the number of your care workers to an absolute minimum.","_items_11_description":"field_64b6765ada6e5","items_12_title":"What do I do if my carer is late?","_items_12_title":"field_64b6764eda6e4","items_12_description":"If your carer has not arrived within 10 minutes of your scheduled time, please call us on the office number and we will contact your carer and let you know when to expect them. We do ask our staff to call us if they are running late to enable us to notify our clients, but sometimes there is an emergency and they do not always have the chance to ring us.","_items_12_description":"field_64b6765ada6e5","items_13_title":"How can I be sure that my care worker will stay the full period of the care visit and carry out all the tasks?","_items_13_title":"field_64b6764eda6e4","items_13_description":"We take a considered and comprehensive approach to ensuring that your care service is exactly what is required. After every visit, your carer will write the details of activities undertaken during the visit in the care plan notes (which is retained by the client). These care plan notes for each month are brought back to our office at the beginning of each new month, where they are checked. If you ever feel dissatisfied with the level of care you receive, you can get in touch with the care manager who can help address and resolve any issues.","_items_13_description":"field_64b6765ada6e5","items_14_title":"What about my personal security?","_items_14_title":"field_64b6764eda6e4","items_14_description":"Every member of the True Homecare team has been through a rigorous vetting procedure before they start working with us. In addition, all staff will always be in uniform and carry a personalised identification card which shows their name, photograph and signature.","_items_14_description":"field_64b6765ada6e5","items_15_title":"What safeguards are in place?","_items_15_title":"field_64b6764eda6e4","items_15_description":"True Homecare is a preferred provider of the Stockport Council and Registered with the Care Quality Commission (CQC). These bodies set the minimum standards by which we operate, however in every case we seek to exceed these minimum standards by a significant margin. Both bodies have standards which set out how we should operate.","_items_15_description":"field_64b6765ada6e5","items":16,"_items":"field_64b6763eda6e3"},"mode":"edit"} /-->

Whether it’s a few hours of companionship, overnight care or full 24-hour support, our trained and compassionate team is here to help.\r\n\r\n[trustindex data-widget-id=1680ea95433d93916f2631ab73c]","_description":"field_64b540e16348e-trf","author_image_left":4327,"_author_image_left":"field_64b5352b6348g-trf","author_name_left":"Jenna","_author_name_left":"field_64b5352b6348h-trf","available_text_left":"Daily 7am–10:30pm","_available_text_left":"field_64b5352b6348i-trf","author_number_left":"0161 428 1989","_author_number_left":"field_64b5352b6348j-trf","gravity_form_id":"1","_gravity_form_id":"field_64b540f663490-trf"},"mode":"edit"} /-->

<!-- wp:acf/three-cols-and-icon-discover {"name":"acf/three-cols-and-icon-discover","data":{"heading":"Tailored Support","_heading":"field_64c8ddffafd1f_discover","description":"We tailor each visit to meet individual needs, supporting daily routines, promoting independence and enabling people to stay connected to their community. From planned respite to emergency cover, our service offers reassurance, continuity, and peace of mind for both the person receiving care and their loved ones.\r\n\u003c/br\u003e\u003c/br\u003e\r\nOur Short Breaks service is available to anyone aged 18 and over who requires support to remain safely and comfortably in their own home. We offer flexible options tailored to individual needs, whether for a few hours, overnight stays, emergency respite or longer-term arrangements.\r\n\u003c/br\u003e\u003c/br\u003e\r\nOur Short Breaks service is available to individuals living anywhere within the Stockport area. We are proud to support people across the community, delivering reliable, flexible care directly in the comfort of their own homes.\r\n\u003c/br\u003e\r\nPricing is dependent on the level and duration of support required and full details are available upon application. Our team is happy to discuss your needs and provide a clear, personalised quote. We accept both Direct Payments and self-funding options, offering flexibility in how your care and support is arranged and managed. Our team can provide guidance on funding routes and help you understand the options available to you.\u003c/br\u003e\u003c/br\u003e","_description":"field_64c8de09afd20_discover","columns_0_title":"Customer service that’s a perfect fit.","_columns_0_title":"field_64c8dd380c986_discover","columns_0_description":"Your comfort is our priority. We’re here to help you live comfortably and independently, with the support you need, when you need it.","_columns_1_description":"field_64c8dd380c98e_discover","columns_1_icon":5138,"_columns_1_icon":"field_64c8dd380c993_discover","columns_2_title":"Care as Unique as You Are","_columns_2_title":"field_64c8dd380c986_discover","columns_2_description":"Every person is different, and so are their care needs. Whether it's short breaks, specialist care, or assistance with daily tasks, we tailor our services to support your health, happiness, and wellbeing at home.","_columns_2_description":"field_64c8dd380c98e_discover","columns_2_icon":5137,"_columns_2_icon":"field_64c8dd380c993_discover","columns":3,"_columns":"field_64c8dd380b47e_discover"},"mode":"edit"} /-->

seo.title: Short Break Care Services in Stockport | True Homecare
seo.description: Need a break? True Homecare offers flexible short break care services in Stockport, from respite to overnight care. Trusted, personalised support for carers. Get a quote!
